title: Deploy Troupes
content:
Roll a 6-sided die to determine deployment order.

**2-Player Game:** High roll chooses **Early Bird** or **Initiative**. Early Bird deploys 1st model within 10” of their edge. Initiative player deploys opposite. Alternate until finished.

**3-4 Player Game:** Players choose unclaimed edges in descending order of rolls and place one model at a time. No player is considered to have Initiative.
